---
title: "References"
bibliography: 
    - ref_numerical_optimal_control.bib
    - ref_optimal_control.bib
    - ref_model_predictive_control.bib
csl: ieee-control-systems.csl
format:
    html:
        html-math-method: katex
        code-fold: true
---

## Stability and recursive feasibility of MPC

## Explicit MPC

It is generally agreed that the idea of explicit MPC for was first proposed by [@bemporadModelPredictiveControl2002]. Comprehensive treatment is in the freely online available (text)book [@borrelliPredictiveControlLinear2017] by the same authors. Last but not least, the lecture slides [@bemporadModelPredictiveControl2021] are recommendable too.

## Economic MPC

[@ellisEconomicModelPredictive2017], [@ellisTutorialReviewEconomic2014], [@faulwasserEconomicNonlinearModel2018], [@rawlingsFundamentalsEconomicModel2012]
